_comment: ViT-Small (standard 384/12/6, patch=10) on HLS4ML LHC jets 150p — cold-start baseline for the 22M tier. 21,412,613 params (verified by building the module). Same tokenization (patch=10 -> 10x10 grid) as DepthViT and the ViT-Tiny baseline, so the ONLY difference vs DepthViT at this tier is the attention mechanism + HAP. Training recipe (SGD lr=0.1, wd=1e-4, momentum=0.9, cosine, 5000 warmup steps, bf16, batch 512 x4 accum) is held IDENTICAL to the DepthViT-22M and 5M runs so accuracy differences are attributable to architecture, not schedule. NOTE ON MATCHING: standard ViT-Small is 21.41M; the current DepthViT-22M config is 22.05M (k=196), a +2.96% gap. See RUN_GUIDE for the matching decision (either drop DepthViT to k=192 -> 21.38M, or nudge this ViT-Small to 390/12/6 -> 22.08M). This file is the textbook-standard baseline; do not change 384/6 unless you deliberately pick the tune-ViT path.

model._comment: Standard ViT-Small. img=100, patch=10 -> 10x10=100 patches (+1 cls token). embed_dim=384, num_layers=12, num_heads=6 (384/6=64 head_dim), mlp_ratio=4 -> mlp hidden 1536. 21,412,613 params.
